title: Layouts / Shortcodes / Review Suggestions
summary: layouts/shortcodes/review-suggestions.html is preserved as a raw Hugo source artifact in the XanaNode Hugo substrate.
content:
{{- $suggestions := site.Data.xananode_suggestions -}} {{- $autolinks := $suggestions.autolinks | default slice -}} {{- $transclusions := $suggestions.transclusions | default slice -}}
{{ len $autolinks }} pending autolinks
{{ len $transclusions }} pending transclusions

Suggestions are generated automatically during prepare/validate, but they are not applied automatically. Each item stays pending until an author reviews and edits the source Markdown.

Open Markdown report · Open JSON report

{{- if gt (len $autolinks) 0 -}}

Autolink Suggestions

    {{- range first 12 $autolinks -}}
  1. {{ .file }}:{{ .line }} {{ .matched_text }} → {{ .target_title }}
    2. {{- end -}}
{{- end -}} {{- if gt (len $transclusions) 0 -}}

Transclusion Suggestions

    {{- range first 12 $transclusions -}}
  1. {{ .file }}:{{ .line }} {{ .target_title }}@{{ .version }}/{{ .range }}
    2. {{- end -}}
{{- end -}}
